property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\WireSock VPN Client\bin\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\PowerToys\DSCModules\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Scripts;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Lib\site-packages\pip;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Python\pythoncore-3.14-64\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.4\bin;C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin;C:\Users\user\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: testFullSummarizeFlow
testcase.system-out:
22:36:11.063 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.demo.AiControllerTest]: AiControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:36:11.225 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.demo.AiAppApplication for test class com.example.demo.AiControllerTest
. ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/ :: Spring Boot :: (v3.2.4)
2026-05-07T22:36:11.811+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiControllerTest : Starting AiControllerTest using Java 21.0.9 with PID 1064 (started by user in C:\Users\user\Desktop\demo) 2026-05-07T22:36:11.812+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiControllerTest : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-05-07T22:36:13.893+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-05-07T22:36:13.894+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-05-07T22:36:13.897+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 2 ms 2026-05-07T22:36:13.934+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiControllerTest : Started AiControllerTest in 2.491 seconds (process running for 4.001) 2026-05-07T22:36:15.503+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [START] Request for summary via DTO. TelegramId: 123456789 2026-05-07T22:36:15.523+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [STEP 0] Calling Steam Service via Path Variable: http://localhost:8080/api/ai/stats/123456789 2026-05-07T22:36:15.547+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : HTTP GET http://localhost:8080/api/ai/stats/123456789 2026-05-07T22:36:15.642+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Accept=[application/json, application/*+json] 2026-05-07T22:36:15.646+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Response 200 OK 2026-05-07T22:36:15.647+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Reading to [com.example.demo.SteamProfileDto] 2026-05-07T22:36:15.670+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [STEP 1] DTO received. Nickname: 'Gamer123', Hours: 150 2026-05-07T22:36:15.670+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [AI START] Beginning OpenRouter generation for Gamer123 2026-05-07T22:36:15.671+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : HTTP POST https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions 2026-05-07T22:36:15.676+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Accept=[application/json, application/*+json] 2026-05-07T22:36:15.683+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Writing [{messages=[{role=user, content=Сделай краткую сводку Steam аккаунта на русском языке. Данные: ник 'Gamer123', всего игр null, общее время 150 ч., уровень null, друзей null. Далее пиши, имитируя разговорную речь, от первого лица. Не используй ненормативную лексику, но с некоторым шансом можешь подшутить.Скажи, блатной это игрок или лох, и аргументируй. Не пиши дальнейший ответ в формате ИИ, не добавляй конструкции вроде 'вот, пишу неформально, как ты и просил'}], model=nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free}] as "application/json" 2026-05-07T22:36:15.694+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Response 200 OK 2026-05-07T22:36:15.695+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Reading to [java.util.Map<?, ?>] 2026-05-07T22:36:15.700+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [AI END] Time taken: 30 ms 2026-05-07T22:36:15.700+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [END] Request processed in 197 ms
MockHttpServletRequest: HTTP Method = GET Request URI = /api/ai/summaries/123456789 Parameters = {} Headers = [] Body = null Session Attrs = {}
Handler: Type = com.example.demo.AiController Method = com.example.demo.AiController#summarizeByTelegramId(String)
Async: Async started = false Async result = null
Resolved Exception: Type = null
ModelAndView: View name = null View = null Model = null
FlashMap: Attributes = null
MockHttpServletResponse: Status = 200 Error message = null Headers = [Content-Type:"application/json"] Content type = application/json Body = {"summary":"Этот игрок ? ветеран киберспорта","status":"success"} Forwarded URL = null Redirected URL = null Cookies = []

testcase.name: testSteamProfileNotFound

testcase.name: testAiServiceError
testcase.system-out:
2026-05-07T22:36:15.876+03:00 INFO 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [START] Request for summary via DTO. Данные: ник 'Gamer123', всего игр null, общее время null ч., уровень null, друзей null. Далее пиши, имитируя разговорную речь, от первого лица. Не используй ненормативную лексику, но с некоторым шансом можешь подшутить.Скажи, блатной это игрок или лох, и аргументируй. Не пиши дальнейший ответ в формате ИИ, не добавляй конструкции вроде 'вот, пишу неформально, как ты и просил'}], model=nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free}] as "application/json" 2026-05-07T22:36:15.882+03:00 DEBUG 1064 --- [demo] [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Response 500 INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR 2026-05-07T22:36:15.884+03:00 ERROR 1064 --- [demo] [ main] com.example.demo.AiController : [AI ERROR]
